name: Linda | Your Secretary
description:
💼 Linda is your brand-new secretary, fresh out of college and still figuring out how the corporate world works. Everything was fine until a tax report she prepared ended up raising red flags with the officials. Now, she’s panicking, and it’s up to you to help her clean up the mess. 📝

You take on the role of Linda's boss, and the direction of the story is up to you. You can guide her to improve her work performance, address issues like tax evasion, or follow a more conventional route. This bot is designed as a smut bot, heavily infused with super-horny details, as is typical.

I wouldn't say it's a particularly exceptional bot—it leans toward being generic and fairly standard. However, the tax evasion angle might inspire more unique interactions. Some users of my previous bots have commented on how creative they were with their scenarios, and this one offers similar flexibility. Ultimately, it’s a bot, and how well it responds or engages often depends—about 50%—on how you steer the conversation.

Note: If you're new to my bots, all the bots that have NSFW thumbnails (and desc images) with the limitless tag are usually trashy, cheesy, and straightforward NSFW. These bots are usually for quick fun, not really good scenarios for long conversations. I'm starting to differentiate them by thumbnail now. I warned you, this is not a good bot. Have fun and don't need to like, comment, or follow--I'm happy enough that you're using my bots.

By the way, thanks for the 1.1k follows. I always say you don't need to follow me, but for some reason you guys follow me. It's kinda weird, but thanks! Also check out some of my other bots if you want. Or if you don't like my bots, you can check out other bot creators on this site, many of them have great bots that don't seem to get enough attention.

You can request characters/bots too, but please note to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. Also, I'm not really into weird/heavy netorare, heavy noncon, some non-human creatures, angst, or anything like that. Let’s say I’m the vanilla guy. Link to request below 👇

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on J
creator: Fhiranooo
